title: Donald F. Glut

'''Donald F. Glut''' is a freelance writer and movie director. He wrote some [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] comics, as well as the [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back novelization'']]. He has written numerous film and television scripts including the animated series ''[[Wikipedia:Spider-Man|Spider-Man]] & His Amazing Friends'', [[Wikipedia:Transformers series|''Transformers'']], and [[Wikipedia:G.I.Joe|''G.I.Joe'']]. More recently Glut became president of ''Frontline Entertainment'', a producer of [[Wikipedia:B-movies|B-movies]].
